sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8636" key="a)nhlipokaiblepe/laios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνηλιποκαιβλεπέλαιος</orth> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κἀλιπ-</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8636.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barefoot and unanointed</tr_> (?), Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
